thirdParty.subtitle: {{count}} third-party account(s) — customers, suppliers, employees
thirdParty.name: Label

thirdParty.whatToDo: What do you want to do?
thirdParty.whatToDoFor: What do you want to do for {{code}}?
thirdParty.multiRibHint: Multi-RIB: multiple bank details can be registered.

journals.subtitle: {{count}} journal(s) — central reference for accounting entries
journals.name: Label
journals.deleteConfirm: Delete this journal? Related entries will not be deleted.
journals.noJournalsDescription: Create your first journal code to start accounting entries.
journals.templateHint: The default entry template will be used when creating entries in this journal.
journals.rightsHint: Only authorized users can post entries in this journal.

fiscalYears.subtitle: {{count}} fiscal year(s) — period management

fiscalYears.noYearsDescription: Create your first fiscal year. The 12 monthly periods will be generated automatically.
fiscalYears.label: Label
fiscalYears.autoPeriodsHint: The 12 monthly periods will be created automatically when the fiscal year is created.
fiscalYears.maxYearsDescription: Up to 10 fiscal years consultable simultaneously

closure.closePeriodConfirm: Close period {{label}}? All journals must be closed first.

saisie.noJournalsDescription: Create journal codes first in Structure > Journal codes.
saisie.closeConfirm: Close this entry? It will no longer be editable.
saisie.notBalanced: Entries are not balanced. Debit and credit must be equal.

journalClosure.title: Journal closure
journalClosure.subtitle: Close your journals by period
journalClosure.confirmCloseMessage: Do you really want to close this journal for this period?

fiscalYearClosure.title: Fiscal year closure
fiscalYearClosure.subtitle: Annual closure and carried forward balances
fiscalYearClosure.confirmClose: Confirm fiscal year closure? This operation generates carried forward entries and is irreversible.
fiscalYearClosure.confirmCloseMessage: This action is irreversible. Do you really want to close this fiscal year?
fiscalYearClosure.label: Label
fiscalYearClosure.warningMessage: This operation will calculate the balances of all accounts (excluding class 6/7), generate carried forward entries in the new fiscal year, then mark the current year as closed.
fiscalYearClosure.noYearsDescription: Create fiscal years first in the Structure section.
fiscalYearClosure.selectYearAndTarget: Select the fiscal year to close and the new fiscal year
fiscalYearClosure.targetMustDiffer: The target fiscal year must be different
